title: AI Prices Soar: Fable's Fall & China's Rise? #shorts
summary: Frontier AI models are becoming prohibitively expensive and face supply vulnerabilities due to geopolitical fragmentation. Chinese open-source alternatives are emerging as cheaper options that could reshape global AI adoption patterns.
writeup: This short argues that frontier AI models are growing prohibitively expensive and carry supply vulnerabilities tied to geopolitical fragmentation. It positions Chinese open-source models as cheaper alternatives that could shift global adoption patterns. The takeaway: cost and supply risk at the frontier may push wider uptake toward lower-priced open-source options.
